summary: GH-96 spec is approved for a minimal offline validator CLI. The spec keeps validator scope limited to local package contract checks and explicitly defers post-check output, failure mapping finalization, Core fixture consumption, runtime behavior, dependencies, and write capability.
reviewed_validation_summary: Spec review consumed `.loom/specs/GH-96/spec.md`, `.loom/specs/GH-96/plan.md`, `.loom/specs/GH-96/implementation-contract.md`, and `.loom/specs/GH-96/task-carrier.md`; `loom suite validate --target . --item GH-96 --json` and `loom suite carrier validate --target . --item GH-96 --json` passed.
follow_ups: GH-97 must define post-check output before the validator warning can be removed.
GH-98 must define failure mapping before Core/App category consumption can be claimed.
